programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: The occupants of a car try to conceal their identities. Officers investigate a vehicle lingering near a park known for illicit sexual activity. Officer investigates a robbery claim at a truck stop.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A bloodied man prowls around an apartment complex. Officers pull over a suspicious vehicle and seize drugs belonging to a passenger who is arrested. Police seize drugs and a large knife from a bicyclist.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A wanted man takes off running, a woman interferes with a traffic stop involving her boyfriend, and deputies respond to a dispute between a man and his girlfriend's son.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A motorcyclist fleeing police slams into a pickup truck at high speed, and a man being frisked invents an interesting story to explain the suspicious bulge in his pants.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: After crashing a car during a pursuit, the driver runs into a pho restaurant and is captured. A loitering suspect is spotted smoking a meth pipe. A drunk driver is pulled from a smoking wreck.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect seen fleeing a vehicle refuses to admit he was ever in said vehicle, and police respond to a call that shots were fired.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Missouri police recover a stolen vehicle, a scuffle between two women at a bar escalates to biting, and a concerned neighbor places a possible domestic violence call.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police track a possible stolen vehicle, a man upset with his neighbors takes matters into his own hands, and officers try to placate a man holding a knife to his own throat.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A passenger flees during a traffic stop, deputies respond to a heated dispute between roommates, and an officer encounters an armed suspect.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An officer spots a suspect returning to an area to pick up a hidden stash of narcotics. An officer learns that occupants of a suspicious vehicle has outstanding warrants. A domestic battery is investigated and justice is served.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A female assailant attacks a woman after merely bumping into her. A woman is arrested for spilling beer on an unsuspecting cameraman’s expensive equipment. Two intoxicated women are placed under arrest after a physical altercation.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A high-speed pursuit ends abruptly when the suspect makes a wrong turn, and a nervous man attempts to hide his crime when he thinks no one can see him.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man arrested on warrants just wants his wife, a vagrant is caught on camera stealing from a liquor store, and officers check on a woman asleep on the side of the road.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man riding a bike at night with no lights decides to take off rather than talk with police, and a dangerous domestic dispute unfolds on the streets of Texas.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A sizable amount of cocaine is seized during a routine search. An officer responds to a domestic dispute call, in which there are conflicting stories at the scene. An officer’s patrol car is nearly struck by a train, twice.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect sends police on a high-speed chase, a wanted man attempts to flee from officers on a bicycle, and security cameras catch a man trying to conceal items in his pants.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An evasive driver blames his girlfriend for his behavior, a pregnant woman makes some questionable choices, and a robbery suspect finds comfort in coming clean.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police have a breakthrough in a burglary case, a man found with drugs in his pants claims the pants are not his, and officers deal with a familiar domestic disturbance call.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers engage in a high-speed chase with a motorcycle going 100mph. A Florida man becomes verbally abusive with a woman and her mother. Police arrest a man who is pulled over for expired tags and end up seizing a rifle and 20 rounds of ammo.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An Oklahoma man's effort to evade units goes up in flames, officers use a beanbag gun on an armed suspect, and deputies intervene in a couple's grocery dispute.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A deputy questions a driver about why his broken-down car looks like it’s been in an accident. Obstacle after obstacle prevents a woman from fixing her janky vehicle. A young man looking for a fresh start falls on hard times.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A seasoned corporal gives some advice to a young man with a new motorcycle. A woman’s impatience lands her in hot water when she’s pulled over for tailgating. Officers give a driver multiple chances to come clean to no avail.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An out-of-control driver wants to get home for his child's birthday, officers respond to a suspected shooting, and a trip to buy dog food turns into a run-in with the police.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers respond to a call of a naked man inside a school. A woman being questioned by police is oblivious to her wardrobe malfunction. Officers on patrol order several female nude sunbathers to cover up.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A police pursuit of a truck leaving a known drug location ends in a crash, undercover officers move in for a drug bust, and a man recklessly fires his handgun in the street.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An uncooperative driver leads police on a high-speed chase, and an alleged convenience store robber in custody won't settle down until he gets a kiss from his girlfriend.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An officer tracks a suspect down a treacherous cliffside, a man puts his brother and elderly father at risk, and a man asks police to take his son to jail.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSIs arrive at their favorite diner only to discover a gruesome crime scene with eight dead victims and a lot of questions.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When a girl is shot and killed at a large rave in the desert, the CSI team has to search for clues, find her missing friend and bring the killer to justice.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When a famed music historian is murdered and left in a piano, it has an emotional effect on Sanders, who had a past with her.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When a K-9 is blamed for the death of his partner, the CSI team discovers there's more to the case.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Things get personal when D.B. Russell is drawn into the investigation of the death of his son's basketball coach.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSI team investigates the death of a reverend who was killed at the grave site of former CSI Warrick Brown.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When five bodies are found in what appears to be a meteor site in the middle of the desert, CSI Finlay recognizes one of the casualties, prompting her to revisit her past.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSI team lends a hand to local law enforcement on the strip with several arrests until a John Doe is found in a car. Also, things become personal for Captain Brass when he discovers some facts about his daughter.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When five people are killed in a small plane crash a mile off the Vegas strip, the CSI team is called to investigate.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSIs investigate the demise of a prominent news anchor during a live broadcast.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSIs need to ace the case involving a rising tennis star. Meanwhile, the CSIs are surprised to hear Hodges is engaged to an Italian bombshell.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When CSI Mac Taylor decides to surprise his girlfriend in Vegas, he discovers she's missing and asks his friend D.B. Russell for help. Gary Sinise of CSI:NY guest stars.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSIs investigate the demise of a famous Cuban singer's sister who's in town as part of a U.S. tour.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Sara is a lead suspect in an investigation after a brief encounter with another man in which she was the last person to see him alive.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Cuando dos crímenes aparentemente diferentes resultan estar vinculados, los CSIs descubren que están entrelazadas parte de la trama.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Tercera y última parte del crossover CSI, en el que el equipo de CSI de Langston ayuda a investigar una red de prostitución que puede haber albergado a un rehén que Langston ha estado buscando en Miami y Nueva York.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Una prueba inusual revelada durante un torneo de bolos lleva al equipo de CSI a investigar un asesinato en un boliche.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Cuando Nick, Greg y Hodges llevan a Henry a celebrar su cumpleaños a un bar de motociclistas, descubren un doble homicidio y encuentran a varios sospechosos todavía en el bar que pueden ser los asesinos.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Un gran tiroteo en una tienda de armas puede estar relacionado con la muerte de una mujer joven involucrada en un pacto suicida.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Dos hermosas mujeres son asesinadas en un hotel de Las Vegas y los CSI descubren a un asesino inusual durante su investigación.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI se adentra en el mundo del golf profesional cuando se descubre el cuerpo de un jugador legendario durante un torneo de alto nivel.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El caso de dos estudiantes de secundaria, uno muerto y el otro desaparecido, llevan a los CSI a unas carreras callejeras de coches y a su complicada red de competición mortal.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Rascal Flatts toma el centro del escenario cuando un miembro de la banda es electrocutado por su propia guitarra durante un concierto, el equipo de CSI investiga si fue un asesinato.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Cuando un niño pequeño es encontrado asesinado, el equipo de CSI descubre evidencia que puede vincular su muerte con un viejo caso que resurgió recientemente.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Catherine y el detective Vartann pasan 24 horas juntos en una habitación de hotel mientras vigilan a un dúo que fabrica drogas en la habitación de al lado.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Cuando el equipo de CSI investiga el brutal asesinato de una familia, rastrean al asesino hasta la casa de al lado, que podría pertenecer al asesino en serie "Dr. Jekyll".

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Cuando Hodges y Wendy llevan a un grupo de exploradores de CSI de la escuela secundaria a una excursión, embellecen su papel en la resolución de casos y llevan su tarea un poco demasiado lejos.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Cuando un estudiante es descubierto asesinado en la escuela de Lindsey, la investigación da un giro brusco cuando el equipo de CSI descubre una conexión poco probable entre la muerte del niño y atrocidades del pasado.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio and the team race against time to find out who is trying to frame Horatio for the murder of a woman he’s been dating.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a "wives weekend" ends in murder, the CSI team is faced with three women whose separate trysts with the victim make them prime suspects

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: The team works in tandem with NY CSI chief Mac Taylor to apprehend a serial killer before he kills the young girl he has just taken hostage

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Ryan Wolfe is attacked and seriously injured while investigating the murder of a distraught soon-to-be ex-wife, and there is no shortage of suspects.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio and the CSI team must rely on a video game for their next clue as to where a group of young gunmen will strike next.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: The CSI team is hard-pressed to find the killer of an infamous drug lord, and a member of the team is investigated for drugs by Internal Affairs.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A rapist is brutally murdered after his identity is exposed. Horatio and the CSI team are called in to investigate the murder.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio and the CSI team investigate a group of male “pickup artists” out to score when one of them unexpectedly turns up dead.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Miami’s Latin Festival shifts from Samba to somber when a crowded dance floor becomes the scene of a gang member. Horatio and the team investigate.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A bizarre murder of a South Beach club owner turns out to be a script where art is imitating life. Horatio and the CSI team investigate.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio’s longtime criminal nemesis Walter Resden surfaces once again, and Caine is determined to finally bring him to justice.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Alex campaigns against a sex offender who moves into her neighborhood and then becomes embroiled in controversy when the man is murdered soon thereafter.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: What begins as a case of apparent Road Rage leads the CSI team to the investigation of a stolen $4 million necklace, which is tied to a murder.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a white supremacist is acquitted for the murder of his wife after learning she is racially mixed, it’s up to Horatio to bring the killer down.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI no se detendrá ante nada para encontrar a quién le disparó a Horatio, la evidencia los lleva a algunas de las personas más peligrosas de Miami.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando la gasolina se vuelve tan cara que los residentes de Miami matan por ella, el equipo de CSI se enfrenta cara a cara con una de las redes criminales más sádicas de la ciudad.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando la hija de la terapeuta de Delko es asesinada, Horatio y el equipo de CSI deben encontrar al asesino antes de que los secretos más oscuros de Delko salgan a la luz.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Un salvaje doble asesinato en los Everglades hace que Horatio y el equipo de CSI se enfrenten a la fuerza bruta de la propia mafia rusa de Miami.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando el equipo de CSI investiga un asesinato en la boutique de moda más moderna de Miami, Horatio descubre que la inestabilidad de Julia la ha convertido en una bomba de tiempo.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Una grúa de 60 metros se estrella contra un rascacielos de Miami, pone en peligro a Calleigh y Delko y acaba con la esperanza de Horatio de atrapar a un famoso jefe del crimen.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Encuentran a un hombre esposado y apuñalado en su habitación de hotel, mientras que una broma en el laboratorio provoca una ruptura en el equipo de CSI y amenaza su investigación.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando un asesino secuestra a un inocente bebé, Horatio y el equipo de CSI deben encontrarlo antes de que el niño se convierta en su próxima víctima.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando un salvaje asesino anda desenfrenado en Miami, Horatio debe intervenir para evitar que un miembro de la fuerza policial se acerque demasiado al caso.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando un tirador apunta al motel donde se aloja Delko, Horatio y el equipo de CSI deben investigar el pasado de Delko para encontrar al asesino.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI, con la ayuda de informantes locales, lucha para salvar un vecindario que está a punto de ser dominado por una violenta pandilla callejera.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio y el equipo de CSI usan tecnología radical para descubrir el secreto de la mente de un hombre cuando este aparece cubierto de sangre sin recordar dónde ha estado.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando ocurre un asesinato durante una carrera de caballos, Horatio y el equipo de CSI descubren que Ryan tiene un vínculo personal con el caso.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Alexx Woods regresa a Miami cuando un asesino pone en peligro la vida de Calleigh y Ryan. Horatio y el equipo de CSI deben investigar.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A role-playing game turns lethal, with one player falling victim to a bona fide killer and the other kidnapped and held for ransom.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When the CSIs investigate two seemingly unrelated deaths, their separate trails of evidence lead to a surprisingly connected conclusion.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The CSIs find themselves immersed in the world of competitive video gaming when they discover a murder may be related to a high-stakes tournament.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A lab tech is murdered in a case that has similarities to a 1950’s cold case, the CSIs get a glimpse into what goes on in the shadows of the lab.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A wave of brutality threatens a small New York City community when a body is found dismembered and strategically left out on four street corners.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The CSIs are called to a Brooklyn housing project to investigate the murder of a successful businessman who felt the pull of his old neighborhood.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When Mac is shot, he finds himself in limbo between life and death, as he fights for his life, it’s up to his team to bring the shooter to justice.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The CSIs investigate when a fire chief – a friend of Mac’s – is killed in a blaze that used the same technique as a recently paroled arsonist.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The CSI New York team rushes to stop serial arsonist Leonard Brooks after he begins using fire against people from his dark past.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Evidence found in photos at a crime scene on the Brooklyn Bridge sends Mac and Jo to San Francisco in search of a missing teenage girl.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The CSI New York team of investigators race to catch a shooter when Lindsay is injured during the attempted murder of a political candidate.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Mac investigates a 20-year-old case involving a missing boy when the prime suspect is found murdered on the anniversary of the boy’s disappearance.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The CSIs investigate a twisted fairy tale when a woman in a ball gown is found at the bottom of the pond outside Belvedere Castle in Central Park.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When a psychiatrist’s patients are being systematically murdered, the CSIs are forced to play along in a game of Clue in order to catch the killer.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Plática poco amigable (S7 Ep2)
programme.desc: Cuando una joven parece ser estrangulada mientras está en un chat en vivo que Adam presencia, el equipo de CSI debe determinar si fue real o una broma.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Condenado, si lo haces (S7 Ep3)
programme.desc: Cuando encuentran a una pareja golpeada en su casa, el equipo de CSI cree que tiene al sospechoso después de que una madre identifica a su hijo, pero no todo es lo que parece.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Sangre por sangre (S7 Ep4)
programme.desc: Cuando asesinan a un poderoso líder de una pandilla, el equipo de CSI de Nueva York debe encontrar al asesino antes de que estalle una guerra callejera.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Cayó del cielo (S7 Ep5)
programme.desc: Un robo de joyas en el ático de uno de los abogados más poderosos de Nueva York da un giro extraño cuando el caso lleva al equipo de CSI a un hombre en la morgue.

programme.title: CSI: New York: No salten pasos (S7 Ep6)
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI de Nueva York encuentra un cuerpo en un tejado y debe encontrar al asesino que está manipulando la escena del crimen.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Escondite (S7 Ep7)
programme.desc: Con un francotirador suelto en la ciudad de Nueva York, Mac debe revivir un caso de secuestro que podría haber creado uno de los enemigos más letales de la ciudad.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Muerta del susto (S7 Ep8)
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI de Nueva York pasa por acontecimientos espeluznantes después de que encuentran a una mujer a la que literalmente mataron de miedo.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Justificado (S7 Ep9)
programme.desc: Mac se enfrenta al subjefe de detectives cuando un oscuro secreto del pasado del jefe amenaza su reputación y a su familia.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Comprar hasta morir (S7 Ep10)
programme.desc: Mac y el equipo de CSI de Nueva York buscan al asesino de un gerente de una tienda de departamentos encontrado muerto en un escaparate navideño.

programme.title: CSI: New York: ¿Con qué fin? (S7 Ep11)
programme.desc: Cuando un hombre disfrazado de payaso le dispara al dueño de una panadería, el equipo de CSI investiga y descubre una decisión del pasado de Flack que puede ponerlo en peligro.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Jaula (S7 Ep12)
programme.desc: Cuando encuentran muerto a un promotor de un club español, el detective Mac Taylor debe enfrentar al jefe del laboratorio de criminalística de Barcelona para resolver el caso.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Fiesta bajo el agua (S7 Ep13)

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: El padre de Inacis la reconoció legalmente, pero falleció sin haber sido incluida en el testamento. Viva Selena es una niña con síndrome de Down que desea ser porrista y Laura la sacó de la academia.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Rafael y Verónica tuvieron mellizos. Uno de ellos tení­a sí­ndrome de Down, en un descuido de ella el bebé se ahogó. Carmen demanda a Sebastián por intento de abuso en un acto religioso.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Oriel exige la custodia del hijo que tiene con Sindy porque no lo deja comer carne. Además, Willian y Marie están casados, hacen un trío con una escultora y producen dildos.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Gerber le dio un batazo brutal en la cabeza a su cuñado porque le daba drogas a su mujer. Además, Sergio era un narco que se casó con Jéssica y con Miriam el mismo día.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Laura provocó la muerte por asfixia de su bebé, de forma accidental, tras consumir marihuana. Además, Gilbert es trabajador del negocio de Raúl, pero siente que este siempre lo ha discriminado.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Adrián quiere la custodia del hijo de Alicia que tiene síndrome de Down. También, Yolanda y su hermano han trabajado con su madre en el restaurante sin remuneración económica.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Liz contrató los servicios de un imitador y un DJ para el lanzamiento de una bebida, pero se emborracharon. Perla va a perder su casa y su hermana no puede ayudarla por estar en pandillas.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Una mujer demanda al marido de su difunta madre para abrir un centro contra la violencia doméstica. Además, la hija de Mayra le exige a su novio, un joven bonachón, que se pelee con su ex.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Raúl recibió en un trasplante el corazón del hijo de Elizabeth, ahora ella cree ser familia. Por otro lado, Omaira quiere adoptar a un niño de supuestamente 8 años, pero hay algo oculto.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Vaneza descubrió que la bebé que adoptó es la nieta de su esposo y quiere revocar la adopción. Alberto fue a prisión por violación a su cuñada que tuvo un hijo y luego se suicidó.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Alejandro se fue de fiesta, bebió mucho y despertó en el hospital golpeado y desgarrado analmente. Juan ganó la lotería, como es indocumentado acordó con su jefe cobrar el premio y dividirlo.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Orlando descubre que mendigando en la calle saca una buena plata, una de sus hijas lo niega. Yuri y Magdalenys son dos niñas con un canal de modas en Youtube, pero quieren separarse.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Ella quiere que su pareja deje de consumir morning glory. Él alega que la sustancia mejora su productividad. Alexander perdió la custodia de su hijo al entrar en prisión. El menor se suicidó.

programme.desc: Clint Eastwood protagoniza esta historia sobre una banda de justicieros que cometen dos errores: ahorcar al hombre equivocado y no terminar el trabajo. Inger Stevens, Pat Hingle, Bruce Dern y Dennis Hopper coprotagonizan este western de acción.

programme.title: Vuelven los siete magníficos
programme.desc: Un noble pistolero (George Kennedy) contrata a una brigada formada por los hombres más peligrosos del oeste para liberar a un líder revolucionario de los campesinos de una importante prisión mexicana en este clásico del oeste.

programme.title: Pistoleros malditos
programme.desc: En esta película, que acaba con los mitos sobre el infame tiroteo de Corral, Stacy Keach interpreta a Doc Holliday, quien se alía con el mariscal Wyatt Earp (Harris Yulin) para desarmar una banda de delincuentes.

programme.title: Toña machetes
programme.desc: La determinación de Lorena por darle un giro a su vida y escapar de un entorno decadente, hará que encuentre en la actuación un camino que le ayudará a descubrir sus talentos y habilidades.

programme.title: Las fuerzas vivas
programme.desc: En un pueblo aislado se recibe la noticia de que ha estallado la revolución. Los dos partidos políticos que regentan la ciudad aprovechen para hacer campaña en favor de sus intereses.

programme.title: Garras
programme.desc: Michael Douglas y Val Kilmer protagonizan esta gran aventura ambientada en el África Oriental de 1896. Dos leones asesinos interrumpen la construcción del ferrocarril. Cazan juntos, sin mostrar temor por el hombre o las armas de fuego.

programme.title: La cacería
programme.desc: El rastreador más famoso del FBI busca a un villano que asesina personas para ser el blanco de una cacería.

programme.title: Desafío
programme.desc: Desafío es una fascinante aventura sobre la extraordinaria historia verdadera de los hermanos Bielski, simples agricultores -independientes y desarmados- que convirtieron a un grupo de refugiados de guerra en poderosos luchadores por la libertad.

programme.title: Garras
programme.desc: Michael Douglas y Val Kilmer protagonizan esta gran aventura ambientada en el África Oriental de 1896. Dos leones asesinos interrumpen la construcción del ferrocarril. Cazan juntos, sin mostrar temor por el hombre o las armas de fuego.

programme.title: La cacería
programme.desc: El rastreador más famoso del FBI busca a un villano que asesina personas para ser el blanco de una cacería.

programme.title: La hija del general
programme.desc: Existe la forma correcta, la forma equivocada y la forma del ejército. Pero bajo ninguna circunstancia, el investigador militar Paul Brenner ayudará a los oficiales de Fort MacCallum a encubrir el motivo de la muerte de una hermosa oficial.

programme.title: Chicas pesadas 2
programme.desc: Las Plásticas están de regreso en la secuela del gran éxito Mean Girls… ¡y ahora la hermandad es más moderna, divertida y feroz que nunca!

programme.title: Un despertar glorioso
programme.desc: Un presentador de la vieja escuela renuncia a su programa de noticias de mucho tiempo debido a las costumbres nuevas. Es reclutado por un productor estrella que quiere revivir un programa matutino endeble.

programme.title: Plan B
programme.desc: Jennifer López interpreta a una soltera que se enamora del hombre perfecto justo cuando decide ser madre en esta comedia romántica de éxito sobre el noviazgo, el amor, el matrimonio y la paternidad, pero no necesariamente en ese orden.

programme.title: Las estafadoras
programme.desc: Una mujer y su hija son estafadoras profesionales que utilizan sus armas de seducción para engañar a millonarios, hasta que la joven hija se enamora poniendo en apuros el último golpe: un excéntrico magnate del tabaco.

programme.title: Dredd

programme.title: Vuelo nocturno
programme.desc: Al poco tiempo de despegar, el compañero de asiento de Lisa, Jackson, le revela la verdadera razón de su presencia. Forma parte de un plan para asesinar a un empresario rico y poderoso...y Lisa es la clave para lograrlo.

programme.title: El Pago
programme.desc: Michael Jennings trabaja en proyectos ultrasecretos. Luego de cada trabajo, borran su memoria.

programme.title: La vigilante del futuro
programme.desc: Major (Scarlett Johansson) es la primera de su clase: Una mente humana dentro de un cuerpo artificial. Al descubrir que sus creadores mintieron sobre su pasado para controlarla, no se detendrá hasta revelar su verdadera identidad y vengarse.

programme.title: La boda de Valentina
programme.desc: Valentina tiene la vida perfecta en Estados Unidos. Su universo tiembla cuando su novio Jason le propone matrimonio y debe enfrentar a su familia, “los perfectos Tate”, con la suya, “los Hidalgo”, la dinastía política más caótica de la historia de México.

programme.title: Compadres
programme.desc: Un policía mexicano y un joven americano hacker de computadores, unen fuerzas para entregar un criminal a la justicia en esta comedia de acción llena de altas emociones y risas escandalosas.

programme.title: Tod@s caen
programme.desc: Tras su éxito en la taquillera pelicula No Manches Frida 2, Omar Chaparro y Martha Higared llegan a la gran pantalla con la divertidísima comedia romántica TODOS CAEN.

programme.title: El infierno
programme.desc: Benny ha sido deportado de los Estados Unidos a México, que está siendo destrozado por las guerras de los carteles de droga. Luego se involucra en el negocio del narcotráfico y comienza a subir de rango.

programme.title: Compadres

programme.title: La Navidad en pleno vuelo
programme.desc: Las acciones de disminución de costos por parte de un líder altamente calificado en números amenazan la Navidad, cuando cancela el evento benéfico anual de una aerolínea destinada a niños necesitados.

programme.title: Les deseamos una feliz Navidad
programme.desc: Un pequeño reno curioso se embarca en una misión para responder a una pregunta importante: ¿de dónde provienen las canciones de Navidad?

programme.desc: La protagonista principal Kelly Hartwick se enfoca en una campana nueva para Navidad, mientras que un hombre de la calle la convence de tratar de buscar el amor de su vida en línea.

programme.title: La vela de Navidad
programme.desc: En Gladsbury, hay una leyenda que dice que cada 25 años un ángel los visita para tocar una vela en la víspera de la Navidad y conceder un milagro a quien la prenda. Pero esto podría cambiar tras la llegada de un joven sacerdote.

programme.title: Una propuesta navideña
programme.desc: Una chef desafortunada que sueña con iniciar su propia línea de restaurantes sobre ruedas, se hace pasar por la novia de un prominente abogado de Seattle que visita a su familia por Navidad.

programme.title: Stephen King's Silver Bullet
programme.desc: En esta película de terror, basada en la novela Ciclo del hombre lobo, de Stephen King. Un hombre lobo está aterrorizando a un pequeño pueblo y depende de un niño discapacitado, y su tío para liberar la ciudad.

programme.title: La Dama De Negro
programme.desc: Arthur Kipps (Daniel Radcliff), un abogado viudo, debe ir a un pueblo remoto a resolver los asuntos de un excéntrico recién fallecido. Pero al llegar, descubre que todos en el pueblo ocultan un secreto mortal.

programme.title: El aro
programme.desc: Sonaba como otra leyenda urbana: una cinta con imágenes de pesadilla que invoca una llamada telefónica previendo la muerte del espectador en exactamente siete días.

programme.title: Visitantes
programme.desc: Espíritus malignos atormentan a una exitosa doctora (Kate del Castillo) y a su familia, haciendo que enloquezcan y desconfíen el uno del otro.

programme.desc: Un joven detective se infiltra en una escuela privada de élite para destruir una red internacional dedicada al robo de autos.

programme.desc: Un joven detective se infiltra en una escuela privada de élite para destruir una red internacional dedicada al robo de autos.

programme.title: The Sons of Katie Elder
programme.desc: The four rowdy sons of Katie Elder return home for her funeral and to avenge her death.

programme.title: McLintock!
programme.desc: The cattle rancher McLintock (John Wayne) puts his brand on the territory and every woman in it! Louise Warren plays a widow who moves with her two children onto McLintock’s ranch to serve as cook, while Maureen O’Hara plays the estranged wife.

programme.title: Red River
programme.desc: John Wayne, Montgomery Clift and Walter Brennan give stellar performances in Howard Hawks' epic masterpiece as a self-made cattle baron (Wayne) and his adopted son (Clift) risk everything to drive their herd across the treacherous Chisholm Trail.

programme.title: The Sons of Katie Elder
programme.desc: The four rowdy sons of Katie Elder return home for her funeral and to avenge her death.

programme.title: The Alamo
programme.desc: John Wayne produces, directs, and stars in this retelling of the Alamo, a battle in which 185 men joined together against an army of 7,000. Filmed entirely in Texas, "The Alamo" is a visually stunning and historically accurate celebration of courage.

programme.title: The Horse Soldiers
programme.desc: John Wayne, Constance Towers and William Holden star in this 1863, fact-based story about a Union mission to destroy a railroad junction deep within Confederate territory.

programme.title: The Rainmaker
programme.desc: Katharine Hepburn garnered an Oscar nomination as the "plain yet magnetically beautiful" tomboy rancher, with Burt Lancaster brilliantly cast in the role of the smooth-talking con man.

programme.title: Guys and Dolls
programme.desc: In New York, a gambler is challenged to take a cold female missionary to Havana, but they fall for each other, and the bet has a hidden motive to finance a crap game.

programme.title: The Quiet Man
programme.desc: An American ex-boxer returns to Ireland to win the hand of a spirited young woman. He is confronted by local customs and the woman's belligerent brother. Set in the verdant Irish countryside, this film has beautiful scenery and local charm.

programme.title: The Rainmaker
programme.desc: Katharine Hepburn garnered an Oscar nomination as the "plain yet magnetically beautiful" tomboy rancher, with Burt Lancaster brilliantly cast in the role of the smooth-talking con man.

programme.title: Miracle on 34th Street
programme.desc: A man named Kris Kringle creates a stir when he's hired as a department store Santa Claus.

programme.title: The Bells Of St Mary's
programme.desc: At a big city Catholic school, Father O'Malley and Sister Benedict indulge in friendly rivalry, and succeed in extending the school through the gift of a building.

programme.title: The Odd Couple
programme.desc: Felix Unger is irate when given notice of another rent increase and organizes the entire building to go on strike until certain repairs and improvements are made to either justify the increase or cancel it altogether.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Alex feels sympathy for a fare who’s a real loser with the women and arranges a date for the man with Elaine, who later discovers that her klutzy companion for the evening is a U.S. Congressman.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Bobby’s career dreams come true when he lands a role in a soap opera, prompting him to throw his torn-up cabbie’s license at Louie, but the dispatcher vows to take revenge if Bobby ever comes crawling back.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: After an operation, Louie, the sharp-tongued dispatcher, panics when he has to keep a promise that he made to God during surgery to turn over a new leaf.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Mechanic Latka Gravas’ youthful and attractive mother makes her first visit to America, and after she and Alex meet and have an evening love affair, Latka assumes that he will soon be getting a new daddy.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: When Alex’s ear is nearly shot off in a holdup attempt in his cab, he stuns his fellow cabbies by quitting and exchanging his driving clothes for a waiter’s tuxedo at a snobbish French restaurant.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The cabbies fall victim to a Hollywood-style roller coaster ride when a production company visits to do a film on taxi drivers. Life at the Sunshine Cab Company turns into a continual champagne and buffet festivity.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: When John crashes Cab 804, the cabbies are shocked into a period of mourning, as they reminisce about the wild and memorable events that occurred when they were driving the legendary cab.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Mechanic Latka Gravas frantically works to save the cracked-up Cab 804 as the cabbies fondly recall times in the legendary auto when Alex delivered a baby, Louie beat a rich brat out of a wad of money, and Elaine met the perfect man.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Oliver finds himself in a jam after asking Lisa to make him homemade fruit preserves. An episode deliciously devoted to Lisa's culinary escapades, Lisa musters all of her Hungarian might to make Oliver the best peach jam he's ever tasted.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: After years of substandard service, Oliver is hellbent on throwing the book at the Hooterville Phone Company. When it becomes clear that the local utility oversight board can't do much about it, he decides to handle matters directly.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Mr. Trendell, the president of the Hooterville Phone Company, hands the company over to a delighted Oliver. But after a day of crossed wires and a switchboard repairman with some loose connections of his own, Oliver is ready to call it quits.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: For the first time, Oliver has a successful crop that needs picking. His tomatoes have grown beautifully. But matters at the phone company continue to divide his precious time, so Oliver looks for an interested buyer to take the company off his hands.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Being president of the Hooterville Phone Company has been a rude awakening for Oliver. The switchboard operator is now calling him at five in the morning! After a bevy of new complaints from unhappy customers, Oliver has just about had enough.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: One might think that when Eb takes a vacation, things around the farm might go more smoothly. But when Eb elopes, leaving his cousin Walter to take his place, it turns out to be a horrible idea. Walter barely knows a weed from a hole in the ground!

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Lisa is reminded that she stored a birthday present for Oliver years ago: a genuine Stavinsky. But what is it? It's a modern art sculpture that is two parts plumbing pipes, one part tire chains, and one part birdbath. Oliver calls it The Thing.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: The continually evolving story of how Lisa (Eva Gabor) and Oliver (Oliver) fell in love gets yet another version in this delightful episode. But one thing is for sure: Lisa and Oliver are just as in love today as the day when he fell out of the sky.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan helps prove the German officer that Klink is defending is innocent of treason so he can get the plans that he had stolen for the Allies.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: The Heroes have to figure how to get a new type of rocket back to England.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan must get a U.S. general out of camp just as General Burkhalter's sister shows up with her intended - Klink's new number two.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan has to discredit a German officer who knows about the operations at Stalag 13.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: The underground team that needs help in blowing up a mobile rocket-launcher battery includes a very lovely woman.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Newkirk hides a stolen German codebook in a dry well, Hogan must come up with a way to get it back.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Klink and Hogan's men together head to the Russian front on a suicide mission to steal some secret documents.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: A gas station has just been set up at Stalag 13 and Hogan plans to blow it up.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan uses Burkhalter's sister as a pawn to get back a captured Allied spy.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Again Hogan uses Klink to deliver information to the Underground but Klink is arrested by the Gestapo for treason on other grounds. Thus Hogan and his men must find a way to free Klink before the Gestapo finds the info on him.

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: A gang takes Mike Stone hostage after killing a policeman in an attempt to flee from a grocery store robbery. They want to trade Stone in for their leader, Buddy Sims.

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: When a boy disappears after school, suspicion falls on the neighborhood recluse.

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: After spending twelve years in prison for a rape, torture, and murder, a young punk returns to San Francisco to seek revenge against Mike Stone, who was the arresting officer.

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: A father finds out that the man who murdered his son is released on a technicality.

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night
programme.desc: When mischievous Cowboy Habersham leads his buddies to a field to steal watermelons for a raucous party at a local lake, no one could predict that the night would end in the murder of Donnie Cole; a murder tangled in a web of infidelity and deceit.

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night
programme.desc: Sheriff Bill Gillespie's daughter Lana learns that her old flame, Lee Thompson, has arrived in Sparta and may be illegally running guns to a local hunting store owner, Raymond Mercer. He’s caught the attention of Lonnie Jamison, who fears the worst.

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night
programme.desc: While singing at her boyfriend Troy’s nightclub, LuAnn Corbin discovers that he is being forced by a shady drug dealer from his past, Brent Shaw, to use the club as a cover to sell Ecstasy. LuAnn is torn between love and her duty as an officer.

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night
programme.desc: Former Chief Detective Virgil Tibbs returns to Sparta and is instantly assigned his first case as a lawyer, representing an accused murderer, Delbert Pike. Pike claims it was self-defense, but the victim’s wife was a witness and says it was murder.

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night
programme.desc: After his nephew Matt almost dies from a drug overdose, Bubba Skinner travels to Atlanta, Georgia to help him overcome his addiction to heroin. While investigating Matt’s drug supplier, he teams up with an undercover detective, Walker Harris.

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night
programme.desc: Sergeant LuAnn Corbin takes temporary custody of an abandoned baby boy found at a crack house after a drive-by shooting is reported in the Bottoms. When the infant’s young mother, a crack addict, comes to reclaim the boy, LuAnn struggles to let go.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: McGarrett attempts to crack an extortion ring preying on small businessmen. The detective's investigation seems to run into a roadblock when it is learned that one of the gang members is courting the daughter of Chin Ho.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: A cat burglar strikes at the home of a socially prominent island family, setting off a fast-moving series of events that lead to a death. McGarrett's search for clues takes him to a rundown neighborhood.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: A police informer tells McGarrett that one of the jurors in the murder trial of island strong-arm has been bribed in an effort to produce a hung jury.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: A double amputee sets out to avenge the loss of his hands by killing every law officer who, he feels, contributed to his maiming.

programme.title: The Avengers
programme.desc: Steed hunts a modern-day Robin Hood, and Cathy joins the Army.

programme.title: The Avengers
programme.desc: Steed takes a country drive, and Cathy endures a night of terror.

programme.title: The Avengers
programme.desc: Steed turns Chef, and Cathy tries to prevent a murder.

programme.title: The Saint
programme.desc: They are three charming ladies - not so young but not too old. What is the secret they dread the world will discover when a blackmailer descends on them?

programme.title: The Saint
programme.desc: Simon visits a San Francisco hotel and steps into a blackmailing frame-up which leads to murder.

programme.title: The Saint
programme.desc: Simon is asked to help break one of the biggest international art smuggling rings in history, and finds that a former girl friend is closely involved.

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: Richard Kimble dates a waitress whose nephew's buddies plan to capture him with a mail-order rifle.

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: Richard Kimble knows negligence caused the death of a salvage diver and he jeopardizes his own life when he befriends the girl accused of being a jinx.

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: David Janssen, who stars as Dr. Richard Kimble, is wounded by a deputy's bullet and finds refuge in an Indian school, but not for long.

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: The one-armed man hires a gunman to ambush Richard Kimble.

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Larry denies Emaginae's baby because he's a momma's boy. Momma Lisa says her son is not the father! Dwayne wants to find out if he fathered Emily's baby and if Randy is his biological father. Then, Tim is paranoid that his wife Ariell is cheating!

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Did Demetrius promise to leave his wife for Ashley and their child? Is Corey's red-headed child his? Comonique is tired of Anthony denying that he fathered their special needs child. What will the DNA test results reveal?

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Raymisha and Tianca both have children by a guy named Robert. But Robert is denying that he is the father! These women want him to step up to the plate! Later, Ashley made one mistake and now she fears that her family will be torn apart forever!

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Josh is furious that his girlfriend Kathryn may be cheating on him… with his brother! Shandi thinks her boyfriend is living a second life with a secret family. Will Nikita cancel her nuptials to Patrick after she watches the hidden camera video?

programme.title: The Maury Show: 2 Women. 3 Babies. Who's the Dad?
programme.desc: Maury will reveal the results of paternity tests on today’s MAURY. Will Maury say “You ARE the father!” and are those the very words the nervous, alleged fathers want to hear?

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Has Antonio been cheating on Chasity since their wedding day? Is Mike sleeping with his wife Lisa’s mother? Jackie swears Danny is cheating and he swears she is…Maury’s got all of the results!

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Toni, Quintin, and his mom return to find out who fathered his son. This time they’ll wonder if Toni cheated! Jenny needs to know whether her husband Matt or his friend fathered her child! Finally, will Vivian end her 30-year search for her son?

programme.title: The Maury Show: Is My Teen Daughter's Fiance A Cheater?
programme.desc: If Mayyadah’s husband’s lie detector test proves that he’s having sex through online chat rooms, then they’re getting a divorce! Will Debbie kick fiancée Pablo out over cheating suspicions?

programme.title: The Maury Show: You Slept With 10 Men…I'm Not The Dad!
programme.desc: Zebarious and his new girlfriend want a DNA test to prove he didn’t father Rhonda’s child. But Rhonda doesn’t think so! Later, Mary says her son’s fiancée is a cheater because she hit on her!

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: On today’s MAURY, Maurio says he didn’t father 5 kids. But when all 5 tests are revealed will he be proven correct, or a five-time loser? Jon’s family says he’s not Courtney’s child’s father! Will the test results say otherwise?

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Saundra is 58 and dating 28 –year-old Ernesto. She suspects he's cheating with her 38-year-old daughter! Then, a wedding is in danger when Shante caught her fiancé texting her niece! Did Kandi catch her fiancé Jason watching his own video?

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Deshan's sister and mother believe he's lying about Joshua Jr.'s paternity and want a paternity test to have the last word! Then, 24-year-old Melissa had a baby with 47-year-old Rob, but Rob's daughter wants DNA proof! Find out today on MAURY!

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Charlotte and Tasheun bonded over their children’s mutual father from a photo album, Brandon, but will the DNA test further confirm this? Then, will Tanya prove that her baby Craig III is the son of Craig Jr.?

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: These women are here with some burning questions! Kendra wants her husband Richard to admit he’s the father of their child AND his mistress’ child! Jevon and his family don’t think he’s the father of Jazmine’s child! Only MAURY has the answers!

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Regina says Fernando fathered her son! Fernando's mother disagrees. His father and aunt believe Regina. Fernando can't sound off because he was killed. Krystal and Ben can't agree on their relationship status and who fathered Krystal's daughter!

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Today it's all about Ashlee! Lucky refuses to believe that his son Dechonne is the father of Ashlee's baby. Dechonne doesn't know who to believe! Then, Ashlee thinks her neighbor Jason is the father, but Jason's sister says she's wrong!

programme.title: The Maury Show: Top Ten Shocking Family Feuds
programme.desc: We’re counting down the top ten most unbelievable moments of family faceoffs! Plus we’ll let you know what happened to some of these guests after they left our show and returned to their lives.

programme.title: The Maury Show

programme.title: Code Geass
programme.desc: A prominent member of the Japanese underground invites Zero to meet with him; Lelouch knows the man from his past, and must use his wits to gain the leader's trust.

programme.title: Code Geass
programme.desc: Lelouch and Kallen mourn the death of Shirley's father and contemplate the deaths caused by their campaign against the Britannian forces; Lelouch heads out to confront Cornelia.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando se encuentra un cuerpo descompuesto metido en un barril, es fácil suponer un asesinato. Pero el cuerpo había sido colocado en el barril 30 años antes. Una de las pocas pistas fue una libreta de direcciones que se encontró junto con el cuerpo.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Una pastilla amarga para tragar
programme.desc: Se cuenta la historia de la bombero Michelle Baker. Después de conocer al Dr. Maynard Muntzing, quedó embarazada de él. Después de esta noticia, ella se enfermaba siempre que estaban juntos.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: El conductor dijo que no podía haber sido él quien atropelló a un peatón y se fugó en la calle Harrisburg. El Jeep Grand Cherokee que él estaba arrendando en ese entonces había sido vendido meses atrás a otro comprador en otro estado.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Se encontró el cuerpo de una mujer joven y una pequeña fibra en la ropa de la víctima llevó a la policía de San Diego directamente al asesino más improbable.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una mujer de 19 años fue encontrada muerta en su automóvil; la escena se había organizado para que el asesinato pareciera un suicidio.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Cabecera
programme.desc: Cuando los cazadores encontraron un cráneo en un cañón de Texas, la policía encontró trozos de ropa, huesos pequeños y un mechón de cabello.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando un corredor de bolsa exitoso no regresa a casa después de su turno, su esposa lo reporta como desaparecido.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Huellas entre ladrones
programme.desc: El asesinato de un excéntrico millonario no fue del todo inesperado; alardeaba de su riqueza y se preocupaba poco por la seguridad personal.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Con un pie en el crimen
programme.desc: El cuerpo descompuesto de una mujer joven fue descubierto en un canal de irrigación de Bakersfield. Si había rastros de evidencia, se había lavado con el agua.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Mientras estaba practicando tiros en un hermoso día de primavera, Martin Dillon es asesinado con disparos. Su amigo sostiene que fue un extraño accidente, pero se necesitan más de 20 años para que la verdad salga a la luz.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando una pequeña niña se enfermó y murió, los investigadores se vieron sorprendidos. ¿Fue un accidente, una enfermedad inexplicable o un asesinato?

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: A la mano
programme.desc: Un oficial de policía acusado de matar a su ex esposa insiste en que ella se suicidó. Los investigadores dicen que fue un asesinato, que era físicamente imposible que la mujer se disparara.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando Lori Auker, de 19 años, salió de su casa de Pennsylvania para ir a trabajar y nunca llegó, se necesitó de la tecnología de la era espacial, pelos de gato e insectos para identificar al secuestrador de la mujer.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Obsesión de verano
programme.desc: En un próspero suburbio de Filadelfia, la policía fue llamada a la escena de lo que parecía ser un ahogamiento accidental.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1984, los bomberos de California habían combatido diez incendios provocados en tres semanas.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Un estudiante de posgrado de la Universidad Estatal de Michigan desapareció y se presumió muerto. Con la ayuda de un profesor de ciencias geológicas, la policía esperaba obtener información de su asesino.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando una niña de 11 años desapareció de un pequeño pueblo en un área remota de Alaska, los investigadores se preguntaron si había sido atacada por un oso o se había perdido en los densos bosques.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Un caso inusual involucrando la violación y muerte de Nancy DePriest en 1988. Después de que Chris Ochoa confesara, el caso fue cerrado. 8 años después, Achim Marino confesó al mismo crimen.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Dos hombres diferentes llamaron a la policía para denunciar el mismo asesinato. Al parecer, ninguno sabía que el otro había llamado. La investigación descubrió circunstancias aún más inusuales.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando un rico magnate inmobiliario desapareció, pareció ser un juego sucio. En su testamento, dejó instrucciones sobre lo que sucedería si moría en circunstancias violentas.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Los síntomas parecidos a los de la gripe de una madre y sus hijos resultan ser algo más grave: intoxicación por talio. Después de la muerte de la madre, los investigadores centran su atención en encontrar al asesino.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Marcado de por vida
programme.desc: Un hombre que había cometido delitos, incluido el asesinato, no fue capturado. Casi 50 años después, los avances en la tecnología y el análisis de la escritura descubrieron al criminal.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En el año 2000, Darrell North, un gerente de construcción, fue encontrado muerto en su tráiler del trabajo en Fort Worth, Texas.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1993, la joven madre, Tammy Tatum, fue encontrada agredida sexualmente y asesinada en su departamento de Longmont, Colorado.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La escena del crimen era especialmente violenta: un esposo y una esposa fueron asesinados a tiros en su habitación. ¿Fue cómplice su hija de 16 años?

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Cuatro caminos
programme.desc: Una mujer nativa americana fue brutalmente asesinada en el desierto de Nuevo México y la escena del crimen estaba llena de evidencia forense.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: El Septiembre de 1984, en un suburbio de Tucson, Arizona, Vicki Hoskins, de ocho años, salió de su casa en su bicicleta rosada para enviar una carta a su madre. Ella nunca regresó, pero su bicicleta ligeramente dañada fue encontrada en las cercanías.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Training Camp opens and many of the new candidates have had to uproot their lives and move to Dallas with no guarantee of making it through Training Camp to become a Dallas Cowboy Cheerleader.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: It is just the second week of rehearsals and Kelli and Judy are quick to run the Training Camp Candidates through the signature kick line and jump split.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: In week three of training camp, the rookie candidates are brought in for their DCC makeover. Under the scrutiny of Kelli Finglass, new hairstyles and makeup applications give the girls the DCC look.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: It's week five of training camp and Kelli is out sick. DCC Technical Director, Kitty Carter, fills in and runs the first rehearsal of the week.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Week 7 of training camp begins with a rehearsal on the field at Cowboys Stadium. Kelli and Judy are ready to make final cuts and tonight's rehearsal could determine who makes the squad.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: It's time to announce the DCC squad but first Kelli and Judy put the candidates through a final field rehearsal at Cowboys Stadium. Tensions run high among the girls as Kelli and Judy watch their every step.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The squad has their first game day performance behind them, but after a bad rehearsal, Kelli warns her new team she will cut girls if they don't give 110 percent.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders take a break from the sidelines and travel to Mexico for their annual swimsuit calendar photo shoot.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders are in full dance mode preparing for their first regular-season home game performance. Kelli and Judy want the choreography to be perfect and press the girls through a few intense rehearsals.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: In the final episode of the series, the Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders are preparing for their marquee performance - The Susan G. Komen Cancer Awareness Halftime Show during a nationally televised Cowboys football game.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Dreams are on the line as the tryouts for the Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders 2013-2014 squad begin.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The pressure is mounting as 54 new candidates compete with 32 returning veterans for an invitation into the famed Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders training camp.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Training camp begins at the Cowboys famous training facility, Valley Ranch. First Meeting is filled with excitement and energy until Kelli calls a special meeting of the veterans.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The "scariest night of training camp" kicks off this dramatic episode as the girls learn the dreaded jumpsplit! It's mind over body, as the girls attempt this famed and required move.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The ladies are really challenged when guest choreographer DJ Guthrie teaches them a new dance style. Kelli and Judy have some tough decisions to make about who will remain on the squad.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The training camp candidates hold their breath as the one and only Kitty Carter pays a visit to training camp. Kitty takes no prisoners as she rips into the new girls as well as the vets.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: With their futures on the line, the training camp candidates try to push through their heightened emotions to show Kelli and Judy they deserve to be part of America's Sweethearts. Unfortunately, for some "Tonight will be your last night".

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: This is it, the last chance, as the girls finally learn their fate. Dreams start coming true as the girls pose for Squad Photo. There is some great dancing as Show Group and the rest of the squad perform for the first time at a new "Meet The Team" event.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Craig’s back with Ashley and he’s determined not to screw it up this time.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Distraught when Ashley refuses his proposal, Craig falls into a major rage, completely trashing his hotel room.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Degrassi has a new hottie in Grade 9 and Manny’s got her eye on him. Especially since her “boyfriend” Spinner can’t even be bothered to take a night off work to come to the Cupid Dance she’s organized.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Something’s wrong with Emma. Though she’s frustrated at being treated with kid gloves by everyone since the school shooting, she’s not sure how she’d rather be treated. So she just keeps going on, numbly reassuring everyone that she’s fine.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Emma steps into the lead role in Dracula, but her recent extra-curricular activities with Jay prove even more dramatic.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Spinner has difficulty dealing with the return of injured Jimmy. He hasn’t talked to him since the shooting, and his guilt over what he did leaves him unable to welcome Jimmy back to school.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Ellie is finding it hard to make ends meet now that she’s living on her own and hates relying on her mother for rent, especially with its obligatory dinners to pick up the cheque.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Paige and Matt are totally in love, so what if they have to keep it secret? It’s worth all the extra effort.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: With school coming to a close, Marco is making huge plans for his summer with Dylan – and their future. He’s considering fast-tracking to graduate high school, joining Dylan in university a year earlier.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After dutifully picking up the Spirit Squad slack for a love-struck Paige all year, Manny feels betrayed when Paige claims all the glory. So Manny plots her revenge with a complicated cheer that leaves Paige with a broken leg on Prom Night.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Ashley’s leaving for the summer, and the idea of their temporary farewell and the stress of writing a song for Kevin Smith’s movie -- is making him, well, nuts. So Craig decides to do whatever it takes to follow her.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Frustrated by everything around him, Craig runs away. As he wanders the street, he befriends a young busker nicknamed, “Skinny”.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: As Paige and Spinner awkwardly discuss last night's surprising kiss-fest, Darcy interrupts. She regrets their fight and breakup. But Spinner tells her he meant what he said – if Darcy can’t accept him, past and all, they're through.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Another year at Degrassi kicks off and Manny decides she’s going to be a serious actress, whatever it takes.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Manny’s still foggy on what exactly it was that happened at Peter’s party the night before. She knows she made a pretty racy video but Peter will erase everything… or so he says.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Paige has got her whole life mapped out. She plans on being accepted into the marketing program at the best university in Canada.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: JT has got his license. He’s got a steady girlfriend in Liberty, who happens to be Student Council President. So why is he feeling anything but a “man”? Because Liberty’s in control.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After all the craziness of last year, Craig has one overriding goal: no drama. He’s focused on his friends, his family, his studies, and his band – a reconstituted Downtown Sasquatch but no Spinner - a new addition is rocking the drum-kit…

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After proving he’s still got talent on the hardwood, Jimmy is invited to try out for the Wheelchair Basketball Association’s Junior Team. It’s Jimmy’s second chance at athletic stardom, and an opportunity to make his father proud.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: As Liberty’s pregnancy enters its sixth month, she and JT are forced to face reality: even though no longer a couple, they have to deal with the pregnancy.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Desperate for cash, JT has stolen drugs from the pharmacy… He becomes entangled in a web between his boss, the drug dealer, and the police.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Someone’s definitely interested in Marco. But as it turns out, Tim is interested in Marco, but not for the expected reason. Tim knows Marco is gay, and has been struggling with how to come out to his friends and family.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The one-year anniversary of the school shooting is approaching and everyone’s feeling the weight of it. Not least of whom is Spinner Mason, still persona non grata.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Paige wakes Alex up in her bed – Paige spent the night on the floor – and as the two girls awkwardly prepare for school, they try to avoid the elephant in the room. As in, that they KISSED last night. What happened?

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Craig bursts into rehearsal with the good news – they’ve been accepted to perform at a Northern Sounds Showcase. The band is NOT so into it at first – music is Craig’s dream, not theirs.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Since being "saved" everything has been going Spinner's way: he's made a good friend in Friendship Club leader Linus; his relationship with Darcy has been going strong, and his recent interest in improving school life has been getting him noticed.

programme.title: Primeval
programme.desc: A huge insect-like creature comes through an anomaly that opens at a race car test track, forcing the team into action.

programme.title: Primeval
programme.desc: The team must deal with a herd of embolotherium - rhinoceros-like beasts from the Eocene which do not budge easily. Danny arrives with a mysterious woman from the future, but can they save everyone from the stampede?

programme.title: Primeval
programme.desc: The team attempt to stop Helen at all costs, enduring a harrowing journey through time via several anomalies, battling future predators, raptors and pterosaurs.

programme.title: Meet the Ancestors
programme.desc: Julian Richards studies the Roman sarcophagus discovered at an archaeological site in Spitalfields. The findings include other objects that could reveal some unheard stories from British history.

programme.title: Meet the Ancestors
programme.desc: Julian Richards studies the artefacts such as bronze brooches, silver rings, amber beads and ivory discovered at an archaeological site in Peterborough.

programme.title: Meet the Ancestors
programme.desc: Julian Richards investigates the numerous unidentified graves discovered in Buckinghamshire to understand the history of the neighbourhood and its residents.

programme.title: Meet the Ancestors
programme.desc: Julian Richards tries to piece together the story behind the ruins of Lihou priory. He tries to establish whether the remains found at the site belonged to monks.

programme.title: Meet the Ancestors
programme.desc: Julian Richards explores excavation sites where remains of human beings are discovered. He uses facial reconstruction technology to illuminate numerous stories lost in the mists of time.

programme.title: Meet the Ancestors
programme.desc: Julian Richards explores a Bronze Age archaeological site near Stonehenge to piece together the story of a prehistoric hunter who used a bow and arrow.

programme.title: Horizon
programme.desc: Exploring the newfound remains of a dinosaur species considered the biggest carnivore in history, all while posing the question whether they engaged in a fight against the Argentinasaurus.

programme.title: Deadly Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Steve is going large as he focuses on the biggest animals to have ever walked the earth. In his dino-den, he starts by meeting the Argentinosaurus, an animal so large that even its poo was deadly.

programme.title: Deadly Dinosaurs
programme.desc: The Jurassic was home to the most vicious and violent predators the world has ever seen. To survive, herbivores had to fight back. Steve Backshall goes on a mission to track down the deadliest of all dinosaur defenders.

programme.title: Deadly Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Steve tries to chomp through a car like a T-rex, wield an axe like an Allosaurus and hitch a ride in Britain's biggest tank to showcase the might of a Spinosaurus.

programme.title: Deadly Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Steve gets freaky on a mission to find the weirdest dinosaur ever. He kick-starts with a Gigantoraptor, an 8 metre tall giant that laid the biggest eggs in history.

programme.title: Deadly Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Steve discovers just what it takes to be a terror from the skies. He straps himself into one of Britain's fastest wind tunnels where he goes head to head against Microraptor.

programme.title: Deadly Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Steve travels to new depths as he discovers just what it takes to be an aquatic terror. His quest sees him rocket through water in spectacular style, just like an Opthalmosaurus.

programme.title: Deadly Dinosaurs

programme.title: Deadly Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Steve goes on an undercover mission to unearth the sneakiest dinosaurs that were far deadlier than they first appeared.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is committed to saving his new friend's bail bonding business, and now must race against time to bring a rogues' gallery to justice in the High Sierra mountain town of Montrose, CO.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Today's fugitive is accused of assaulting a police officer, so Dog and the team are not taking any chances. So Dog has to play on his target's greed and deploy some modern technology to set a trap for this runner.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
